name: goliath/wg-sustainability
title: Why Goliath – Sustainability
description: Image and text split section covering Goliath’s sustainability credentials.

heading.default: Supporting Sustainability, One Upright at a Time

p1.default: The waste of steel, material, and labour costs when replacing uprights is a major problem in warehousing.

p2.default: By replacing your racking, Goliath™ lowers the amount of steel required to achieve the same result. This means you’ll never have to repair the upright again, eliminating steel waste from the most high-traffic areas of your warehouse.

p3.default: This ensures a more sustainable warehouse operation and helps businesses reduce their environmental footprint.
